Settings Export / Import

Settings export bundles your provider keys, connections, profiles, libraries, webhooks, and API tokens into a single encrypted file you choose a passphrase for. Use it to back up your configuration off-host or to clone a working setup onto a fresh Stillwater instance. Read more →

Export all settings (provider keys, connections, profiles, webhooks) as an encrypted file. A passphrase you choose protects the file, so it can be imported on any Stillwater instance.

Pick a passphrase used to encrypt the exported file. You will need the same passphrase to import the file later. Read more →
Exporting...
Pick the encrypted .json file produced by a previous export. Read more →
Enter the same passphrase used when the file was exported. Read more →
Importing...

The export file is encrypted with your passphrase using PBKDF2 + AES-256-GCM. You will need the same passphrase to import the file on any instance.
